column1: # GRCh38.p14 alt loci scaffold placement relative to primary chromosomes
# Source: UCSC hg38 altSeqLiftOverPsl + NCBI GCF_000001405.40 assembly report
#   ucsc_alt_name       UCSC-style name of the alt scaffold (matches BAM/BED naming)
#   primary_chrom       Primary chromosome this scaffold is placed on
#   primary_start       0-based start of aligned region on the primary chromosome
#   primary_end         End of aligned region on primary chromosome (half-open)
#   alt_aligned_start   0-based start of aligned region on the alt scaffold
#   alt_aligned_end     End of aligned region on alt scaffold (half-open)
#   alt_start_tail      Unaligned bases before the aligned region on the alt scaffold
#   alt_stop_tail       Unaligned bases after the aligned region on the alt scaffold
#   alt_seq_length      Full length of the alt scaffold
#   orientation         Strand of the alt scaffold relative to primary (+/-)
#   refseq_acc          RefSeq accession (matches NCBI FASTA headers)
#   coord_conversion    Linear formula: primary_pos -> alt_pos (ignores small indels;
